prestazioni: Replace the original 3.4L XK inline-6 (engine code: XK6) with a fully built 3.8L stroker version using a forged crankshaft from JE Pistons (3.820" stroke), forged Mahle pistons (9.0:1 compression), and Cunningham conrods for high-RPM durability. Pair with a custom camshaft profile from Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.450" lift) for aggressive mid-to-high-end power delivery.

Install a custom-built fuel system featuring dual Weber 48 IDA carburetors (with velocity stacks and 45mm chokes) on an aluminum intake manifold by TWM Induction, paired with a Facet Silver Top fuel pump and -8 AN braided lines for consistent fuel delivery under high G-forces.

Upgrade the drivetrain with a Tremec T56 Magnum 6-speed manual transmission (adapted via a custom bellhousing by QuickTime) and a limited-slip differential from Quaife (ATB helical LSD, 3.54:1 final drive ratio) for improved acceleration and cornering stability.
estetica: Replace the original bumpers with lightweight aluminum replicas from SNG Barratt, featuring integrated tow hooks and a satin black powder-coated finish. Pair with a custom front splitter from Kamei (XK140-specific, carbon fiber) and a rear diffuser from Maxton Design (hand-formed aluminum, bolt-on for XK140 chassis).

Install a custom widebody kit from RWB Japan (modified to fit the XK140’s unique wheel arches), paired with 16x8.5" front and 16x9.5" rear wheels from Revolution Wheels (5x120 PCD, 35mm offset) wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ tires (205/55R16 front, 225/50R16 rear).

Replace the original interior with a full retrim by Royal Steering Wheels, featuring black Alcantara seats with red stitching (XK140-specific patterns), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a custom gauge pod from Smiths Instruments (replica 1950s design with modern stepper motors for accuracy).
